prompt: Edit image 1: replace the laptop with a detailed game asset model based on image 2, placing the apple from image 2 as a prop. Overlay a UI on the screen reflecting a game data spreadsheet like image 3 for a game asset scene.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Replace the current laptop with a highly detailed 3D game asset model of a laptop, resembling the silver design and proportions of the laptop in image 2. Place the red apple from image 2 on the wooden table, directly beside this new game asset laptop. On the screen of the game asset laptop, overlay a user interface (UI) displaying a game data spreadsheet, mirroring the layout, column headings, and content style visible on the laptop screen in image 3.
objects: highly detailed 3D game asset laptop (silver design and proportions resembling image 2)
red apple on the wooden table, directly beside the laptop
game data spreadsheet user interface on the laptop screen (mirroring layout, column headings, and content style of image 3)
